title: でっけえ花火に、わあっしょい！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been several days since the summer training camp started, and we're making good progress... almost too good.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Surprised, Boss? Well, I'm just gettin' warmed up! C'mon, gimme the
next exercise already!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Surprised, Boss? Well, I'm just gettin' warmed up! C'mon, gimme the
next exercise already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her hard-working attitude is as impressive as ever... But I can't let her
go too far. She needs a break.
choice_data_list: I think we should call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, right. There's a festival and fireworks tonight! Hehe, I gotta
show the locals how we party in Edo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let out a sigh of relief when Inari One accepts my suggestion without
protest. A night of fun with her friends should serve as a good
refresher for her.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, what about you? If I'm free, you should be too, right?
choice_data_list: I just have a few things I want to work on...
I just have a few things I want to work on...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, what about you? If I'm free, you should be too, right?
choice_data_list: I just have a few things I want to work on...
I just have a few things I want to work on...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Well, that's a problem. I thought I'd be goin' with you, so I
didn't invite any of my friends!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Well, that's a problem. I thought I'd be goin' with you, so I
didn't invite any of my friends!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but if you're busy with work, I guess I can go by myself...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Hehe, thanks a lot! Anyway, let's meet up later tonight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely she could have found someone to go with her, even at the last
minute... But since I already agreed to go, I make my way to the camp
lodge.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Geez, Boss... you weren't gonna skip another break, were ya?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Geez, Boss... you weren't gonna skip another break, were ya?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm gonna make sure you feel extra relaxed today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa-ho, get a load of this place! Hnngh! Do ya feel that?! The passion?! Now this is a festival!
choice_data_list:
Look at all these stalls... You thinking what I'm
thinking?

Look at all these stalls... You thinking what I'm
thinking?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, oooh yeah! Ready for another crime spree, Boss? Let's show
these festival games what we're made of!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you bet! Ready for another crime spree, Boss? Let's show these
festival games what we're made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing the excitement on her face, I can't help but smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bright-eyed Inari One takes my hand, and our festival stall
conquest begins.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Don'tcha just love the way fireworks rattle through your
whole body?! Just makes ya wanna SCREEEAM, don't it?! I know I do!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: HEY, BOSS! CAN YA HEAR ME?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: HEY, BOSS! CAN YA HEAR ME?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! C'mon, it feels good to let it all out! Now, one more time!
OOOH YEEEAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, there ya go!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Man... Even I'm gettin' worked up! Well, at least I can rest assured
knowin' Boss got a brea—)
choice_data_list: Was this a good break for you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Man... Even I'm gettin' worked up! Well, at least I can rest assured
knowin' Boss got a brea—)
choice_data_list: Was this a good break for you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems surprised, so I quickly explain that, while I don't think she's
overdoing it, I was concerned that she might be working a little too
hard lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her magnetic personality naturally attracts the hopes and dreams of
others. That can certainly be seen as the source of her incredible
drive...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it could easily turn into a heavy burden. That's why I hope that
today helped lighten that emotional load, even just a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are ya sayin'? Answerin' people's hopes and dreams is what
I'm all about! Sure it can be heavy, but—
choice_data_list:
It's okay to ask for help, right? Then let me take
some of that burden.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the heck? It's almost like...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (The one workin' overtime... was me.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I swear, Boss... You're just full of surprises.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Not gonna lie, I was not expectin' Boss to say that. But weirdly...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I feel... lighter somehow. Like I just got into a bath at the perfect
temperature.)

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: For cryin' out loud, girl, didja think I wouldn't notice?! I can see that you don't wanna be here in your heart of hearts. I'm old, not blind.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: If you're a true Edo girl, you'll take on the Twinkle Series, show 'em what the downtown's made of, and become a racing sensation there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Guess I have taken on a lot. I don't exactly wanna disappoint Chief,
after all.)

text_block_list.name: Soba Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
He's right, you know! No matter where you're runnin', we'll be cheerin'
you on!

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Show 'em how we do things downtown! Turn that Twinkle stage
upside down!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Same goes for the folks back home supporting me. Gotta show 'em a
runner filled with hometown pride, don't I?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I guess it's true...)

text_block_list.name: People from Downtown
text_block_list.text:
YEEEAH!
INARI! INARI! INARI! INARI!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I really have been... carryin' this burden all on my own.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh... Being this dense doesn't suit me. Not one bit.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guess my eyes were a bit too focused on the prize. Can't believe I made ya worry about me like that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guess my eyes were a bit too focused on the prize. Can't believe I made ya worry about me like that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: We're a team, so I needa act like it, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're somethin' else, Boss! Ya could make a girl fall in love
with that kinda consideration.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're somethin' else, Boss! Ya could make a girl fall in love
with that kinda consideration.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look, look! They're firin' off the big boys now!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(If the boss and I carry this weight together, the fireworks we make
will be even bigger!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Then the cheers we get won't just be your basic yippees or yays.
They'll be more like...)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: WOOOHOOO! HELL YEAH!
